name: Starter Editing
description: Template prompts for rewriting and tightening prose.

prompts.title: Make it cleaner
prompts.prompt: Rewrite this paragraph so it is clearer and more natural, but keep my voice and do not make it sound corporate.

prompts.title: Sharper opening
prompts.prompt: This introduction feels flat. Give me three stronger openings with different tones: direct, warm, and punchy.

prompts.title: Preserve meaning
prompts.prompt: Tighten this text by about 30 percent without losing nuance or changing the argument.

prompts.title: Tone adjustment
prompts.prompt: Make this message sound calmer and more diplomatic without making me sound weak or apologetic.

prompts.title: Find the weak spots
prompts.prompt: Read this draft and tell me where the logic, flow, or wording gets muddy. Do not rewrite everything unless needed.
